name: Pharma-Bio Serv, Inc.
summary: Pharma-Bio Serv, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated regulatory affairs, quality, compliance, and technology transfer consulting firm headquartered in Puerto Rico. It serves pharmaceutical, chemical, biotechnology, medical device, cosmetic, and food industries in Puerto Rico, the United States, Europe, and Brazil. Services include regulatory compliance, validation, technology transfer, engineering, and project management. Revenue is derived approximately 99% from time-and-materials contracts and 1% from fixed-fee contracts, serving approximately 70 customers annually.
